A narrower white closet/secondary door sits recessed to the left inside the same opening. On the left wall there is a thermostat above a double light-switch plate; on the right wall a single switch and a partially visible dark circular wall decoration appear near the upper right. Beige textured walls and wood threshold at the base of the door are visible. Scene is uncluttered and shows typical interior trim and hardware details useful for matching this node view."
